seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: Ensure the email avoids technical jargon and is easy to understand.
new_constraint: The email must include at least one technical term related to the project.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. Ensure the email avoids technical jargon and is easy to understand. The email must include at least one technical term related to the project.
response:
Subject: Extension Request: [Project Name] - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension on the [Project Name] project, which is currently due in two days.

I have been working hard on the assignment, but I have run into some difficulties while trying to properly implement the **data normalization** process. Because of this, I need a little more time to ensure that my results are accurate and that the final submission meets the standards of the course.

Would it be possible to submit my project by [New Date] instead? I am committed to producing high-quality work and would greatly appreciate the extra time to polish the final details.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]<turn|>
